title: juncus ochrocoleus
intro: Juncus ochrocoleus, also known as Marsh Cotton-Grass or Rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Juncus ochrocoleus include soothing irritated throats, reducing fever, and alleviating congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for easy consumption, and it is often used in traditional medicine practices.
